title: HANDLANDY 2 Pairs Kids Gardening Gloves for Age 2-13, Foam Rubber Coated Childrens Garden Yard Work Outdoor Playing Gloves for Little Girls Boys (Size 3, Age 4-5)
features: Soft & Comfortable Nitrile Coating: These kids gardening gloves feature a soft nitrile coating that provides comfort and protection while allowing kids to handle plants, soil, and tools with ease.
Breathable & High Dexterity: Designed with seamless lining and stretchy fabric, these childrens work gloves are breathable and flexible, offering high dexterity for little hands to move freely.
Snug Fit with Elastic Wrist Closure: The elastic knit wrist closure ensures a snug fit, keeping dirt and debris out while providing a secure and comfortable feel.

Bright Colors & Cute Patterns: Available in bright colors and adorable patterns, these toddler gardening gloves are fun and appealing for kids, encouraging them to enjoy gardening and outdoor activities.

2-Pack Great Gift Idea: Includes 2 pairs of gloves, making it a perfect gift for kids who love gardening, outdoor play, or helping out in the yard. Five sizes options: Size 2 (fit for 2-4 years old), Size 3 (fit for 5-6 years old), Size 4 (fit for 7-8 years old), Size 5 (fit for 9-10 years old), Size 6 (fit for 11-13 years old).
description: Product Description Kids Painting Gloves Every child has his own world, such a world requires unfettered imagination.When they use their artist’s imagination, always dirty their little hands. HANDLANDY kids gloves keeps kids imagination but hands clean. Kids Gardening Gloves Enjoy weekend family time with children in the garden, HANDLANDY children's garden gloves keep kids little hands away from dirt, mud, insects and sharp objects in the garden. Kids Outdoor Gloves Comfortable and breathable kids gloves for outdoor activities, explore the wonderful world, just bravely to catch bugs and crayfish. Kids Protective Gloves Join the community’s environmental actions, but while protecting the environment also needs to protect the little hands. Breathable Mesh Back Stretchable fabric back for comfortable & breathable and provide snugly fit, no more overhead or sweaty hands. Rubber Coating Palm Ultra-soft rubber coating for anti-slip and provide excellent grip, makes it easy to grasp garden tools while keeping hands clean. Elastic Wrist Stretchable knitted wrist for a snug fit, and keep dirt out. Kids safety work gloves for general purpose use: garden, yard, or indoor and outdoor play. Multiple Size Options Five sizes to choose from, fit for as little as 2 years old toddler to 13 years old boys and girls.
